opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I eat, it feels like a heavy brick is sitting right under my ribs, and the burning is keeping me awake.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The upper tummy fullness and burning after meals has got worse and is stopping me sleeping.

symptom_narrative.onset: 4 weeks of intermittent fullness, worse in the last 24h after a big meal
symptom_narrative.character: burning epigastric discomfort, fullness, early satiety, belching, mild nausea
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: just under my ribs in the middle
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: belching, occasional nausea, no vomiting; NO weight loss, difficulty swallowing, black stools or vomiting blood

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; anxious about the location near the chest

objective_data_offered.value: burning epigastric fullness 30-60 min after meals, partial antacid relief
no weight loss, no swallowing difficulty, no black stools/vomiting blood
